mapper.sql: id, site_id, snapshot_date, indexed_pages, avg_position, clicks, impressions, ctr, metrics_json::text as metrics_json
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_seo_metrics_snapshots WHERE site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 30
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_seo_metrics_snapshots ( site_id, snapshot_date, indexed_pages, avg_position, clicks, impressions, ctr, metrics_json ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{indexedPages}, #{avgPosition}, #{clicks}, #{impressions}, #{ctr}, #{metricsJson}::jsonb ) ON CONFLICT (site_id, snapshot_date) DO UPDATE SET indexed_pages = EXCLUDED.indexed_pages, avg_position = EXCLUDED.avg_position, clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks, impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions, ctr = EXCLUDED.ctr, metrics_json = EXCLUDED.metrics_json
